description: Led end-to-end development of Palm Oil Plantation & Mill Management Systems covering FFB tracking, weighing, grading, processing, and production reporting.
bullets: Led end-to-end development of Palm Oil Plantation & Mill Management Systems covering FFB tracking, weighing, grading, processing, and production reporting.
Worked closely with estate managers and senior stakeholders to digitize workflows and improve operational visibility and data accuracy.
Translated plantation and mill processes into structured system logic, dashboards, and operational reports.
Maintained and enhanced live systems to ensure stability for daily operational use.
